title: Yukio
content:
{{MarvelLegacy|Fox|[[Earth-10005]]|4=Characters|6=the 20th Century Fox Movies}} {{Character |image = Yukio.png |real name = Yukio{{Ref|DW}} |species = [[Mutant]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Female |affiliation = {{Affiliation|X2E10005}} |movie = ''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]'' |actor = [[Shioli Kutsuna]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|Hi, Yukio."
"Hi, Wade.|[[Wade Wilson]] and Yukio|Deadpool & Wolverine}} '''Yukio''' is a member of the [[X-Men/Earth-10005|X-Men]] and the girlfriend of [[Ellie Phimister]]. ==Biography== {{MD|Yukio (Earth-10005 Revised)||1}} ===Wade Wilson's Birthday=== {{Quote|It's a hair system."
"I love your hair system, Wade.|[[Wade Wilson]] and Yukio|Deadpool & Wolverine}} Yukio was born a [[mutant]] with the ability to manipulate electricity, leading her to joining the [[X-Men/Earth-10005|X-Men]], where she met and began dating fellow member [[Negasonic Teenage Warhead]]. Yukio would meet another mutant, [[Deadpool]], who temporarily joined the X-Men, although it did not last, but the two became very friendly with each other. In [[2020s/Earth-10005#2024|2024]], Yukio was invited to Wilson's surprise birthday party at his [[Wade Wilson's Apartment|apartment]], along with Negasonic, as well as the rest of Wilson's friends. After surprising Wilson when he returned home, all the guests mingled with each other. Yukio and Negasonic talked with Wilson about his toupée, which Yukio liked. [[Peter Wisdom]] showed Yukio and Negasonic his chain piercing, which Yukio pulled on. All the guests listened to Wilson make a speech about how grateful he was to have them in his life. A few days later, they all got together again for dinner, and were joined by [[Logan]] and [[Laura]].{{Ref|DW}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== ''To be added'' ===Abilities=== ''To be added'' ==Facilities== ''To be added'' ==Relationships== ===Allies=== *[[X-Men/Earth-10005|X-Men]] - Teammates and Friends **[[Negasonic Teenage Warhead|Ellie Phimister/Negasonic Teenage Warhead]] - Girlfriend **[[Colossus|Piotr Rasputin/Colossus]] *[[Deadpool|Wade Wilson/Deadpool]] - Friend *[[Vanessa Carlysle]] *[[Dopinder]] *[[Blind Al]] *[[Peter Wisdom]] *[[Shatterstar|Rusty/Shatterstar]] *[[Buck]] *[[Wolverine|Logan/Wolverine]] *[[X-23|X-23/Laura]] *[[Dogpool|Mary Puppins/Dogpool]] ==Trivia== *In the comics, Yukio is a human and a ninja of [[Japan]]ese origin who is an ally of the [[X-Men]], specifically [[Wolverine]] and [[Storm]]. She is part of [[Professor X]]'s secret network of [[humans]] and [[mutants]], known as the [[w:c:marvel:Mutant Underground (Earth-616)|Mutant Underground]]. **In {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}}, the Revised Timeline version of Yukio shares similarities with '''Noriko "Nori" Ashida''', also known as '''Surge''', a young mutant who's a Japanese immigrant with electricity-based powers, and presently requires gauntlet-like regulators to fully control her powers. She eventually becomes the leader of the [[w:c:marvel:New X-Men (Earth-616)|New X-Men]]. *In {{WPS|20th Century Fox}}'s {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}}, Yukio is an [[X-Men|X-Man]] and lover of [[Negasonic Teenage Warhead]]. Yukio, Phimister and [[Colossus]] helped [[Deadpool]] in his fight against The Headmaster. *In 2023, a character based on this version of the character was adapted into the comics proper as '''Yuki Ohara''', a [[Canada|Canadian]] mutant with electricity-based powers and a romantic connection to [[Negasonic Teenage Warhead]]. She is also a space courier and part-time mech pilot. ==Behind the Scenes== *Yukio in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] continues the live-action incarnation of the character from {{WPS|20th Century Fox}}'s {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}}, who was portrayed by [[Shioli Kutsuna]], following an incarnation portrayed by {{WPS|Rila Fukushima}} in ''{{WPS|The Wolverine (film)|The Wolverine}}''. *[[Chelsea Li]] was a stand-in for [[Shioli Kutsuna]] in the role of Yukio. ==References== {{Gallery|Yukio/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{Marvel|Yukio (Earth-10005 Revised)}} *{{Marvel|Surge}} *{{Marvel|Yuki Ohara}} *{{WP|Yukio (comics)|Yukio}} *{{WP|Surge (Marvel Comics)|Surge}} [[es:Yukio]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Deadpool & Wolverine Characters]] [[Category:Mutants]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:White Hair]] [[Category:Pink Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:X-Men Members/Earth-10005]] [[Category:LGBTQIA+ Characters]]
